text:
Created attachment 182426
correct freemem calculation

Current taskmanager display free mem as: Inact + Wired + Free.
This is not correct because applications cant use mem from Inact and Wired.

Also there missed patch from my prev bug report:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=217241#c4
